title: olearia fragrantissima
intro: Olearia fragrantissima, also known as the sweet daphne or fragrant daphne, is a flowering shrub native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Olearia fragrantissima include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and calm digestive issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Olearia fragrantissima is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil.
